LanguageData.MedievalVendingMachine.description: A vending machine for guests that requires no power.
LanguageData.MedievalVendingMachine.label: medieval vending machine
LanguageData.OwlFridgeVendingMachine.description: A vending machine to sell perishable food to guests.
LanguageData.OwlFridgeVendingMachine.label: fridge vending machine
LanguageData.RimFridgeVendingMachine.description: A vending machine to sell perishable food to guests.
LanguageData.RimFridgeVendingMachine.label: fridge vending machine
LanguageData.VendingMachine.description: A standard vending machine for guests.
LanguageData.VendingMachine.label: vending machine
